# Reliability Unit-Test Coverage Matrix

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by `mcp_agent_mail_cli::reliability_coverage`. Do not edit by hand.
     Regenerate: `UPDATE_GOLDEN=1 cargo test -p mcp-agent-mail-cli --test reliability_coverage_ci`
     Enforced by: `am ci` (gate) and `am verify reliability-coverage` (lane). -->

Tracks the unit-test Definition-of-Done for the `br-bvq1x` reliability program.
Each listed module must carry at least one inline **error-path** test. The check is
enforced in CI; this document is the human-readable map of what is covered.

## Definition of Done

- Every reliability code path has inline `#[cfg(test)]` tests for happy, edge **and** error cases.
- Tests are deterministic (asupersync `LabRuntime`/virtual time; no wall-clock sleeps, no tokio).
- User-facing / persistence / transport paths meet the `R0`/`R1` realism floor in
  `docs/VERIFICATION_COVERAGE_LEDGER.md`.

## Coverage matrix

| Track | Module | Behavior | Realism | Error-path tested |
|-------|--------|----------|---------|-------------------|
| A | `crates/mcp-agent-mail-core/src/error.rs` | Unified error taxonomy and classification | R1 | ✓ |
| A | `crates/mcp-agent-mail-db/src/circuit_breaker.rs` | Corruption circuit breaker: trip only on edit-blocking corruption | R1 | ✓ |
| A | `crates/mcp-agent-mail-db/src/error.rs` | DB error classification (transient vs corruption vs MVCC) | R1 | ✓ |
| B | `crates/mcp-agent-mail-db/src/integrity.rs` | Schema/integrity invariant checks and scoped verdicts | R1 | ✓ |
| B | `crates/mcp-agent-mail-cli/src/doctor/mutate.rs` | Doctor mutate() chokepoint: backup, atomic write, scope refusal | R0 | ✓ |
| D | `crates/mcp-agent-mail-db/src/pool.rs` | Connection pool, owner/lock inspection, recovery & backoff | R0 | ✓ |
| G | `crates/mcp-agent-mail-db/src/cache.rs` | Write-behind cache coherency and invalidation correctness | R1 | ✓ |
| G | `crates/mcp-agent-mail-db/src/migrate.rs` | Schema migration gate and legacy-timestamp conversion | R0 | ✓ |
| G | `crates/mcp-agent-mail-db/src/wal_classify.rs` | WAL/SHM sidecar classification & safe-checkpoint policy | R0 | ✓ |
| K | `crates/mcp-agent-mail-db/src/retry.rs` | Bounded retry / circuit-breaker state machine | R1 | ✓ |
| K | `crates/mcp-agent-mail-db/src/snapshot.rs` | Last-known-healthy verified snapshot & snapshot-preferred recovery | R0 | ✓ |
| K | `crates/mcp-agent-mail-storage/src/recovery.rs` | Archive-to-DB reconstruction / recovery procedures | R1 | ✓ |
| K | `crates/mcp-agent-mail-storage/src/boot_check.rs` | Boot-time consistency validation | R1 | ✓ |
| I | `crates/mcp-agent-mail-core/src/metrics.rs` | Runtime metrics, heartbeats and watchdog counters | R1 | ✓ |
| Storage | `crates/mcp-agent-mail-db/src/coalesce.rs` | Commit coalescing batch/flush correctness | R1 | ✓ |
| Storage | `crates/mcp-agent-mail-storage/src/lib.rs` | Git-backed archive writes, WBQ and commit coalescer | R0 | ✓ |

## Summary

- Reliability modules tracked: 16
- With error-path coverage: 16/16
